Document:
# Cooking Recipes
Complete list of cooking transformations. Each item shows its input state and the temperature required to transform it.
## Temperature Guide
- [bold]Raw → Cooked:[/bold] 400K - [bold]Cooked → Burnt:[/bold] 500K+
## Dough Transformations
[bold]Large Dough → Bread:[/bold] 400-500K [bold]Bread → Ash:[/bold] 500K+
## Meat Transformations
Various meats can be cooked into different dishes:
[bold]Raw Meat → Cooked Meat:[/bold] 400K [bold]Cooked Meat → Burnt Meat:[/bold] 500K+
## Vegetable Transformations
[bold]Raw Vegetables → Cooked Vegetables:[/bold] 400K [bold]Cooked Vegetables → Burnt Vegetables:[/bold] 500K+
## Egg Transformations
## General Tips
- [bold]Watch the pot[/bold] — cooking is automatic once correct temperature is reached - [bold]Use appropriate heat sources[/bold] — too much heat burns, too little doesn't cook - [bold]Some recipes need multiple ingredients[/bold] — check the workbench
Back to [textlink="Cooking" link="OE14Cooking"] main page.
